ATC CLEARANCES WILL BE PROVIDED UPON REQUESTS FROM THE CREW, EITHER   TO HOLD OR REROUTING TO AVOID THE DEBRIS RESPONSE AREA.  NOTAM WILL BE CANCELLED AS SOON SANTA MARIA OAC HAS CONFIRMATION OF   THE END OF ACTIVITY.
